title: verbascum adzharicum
intro: Verbascum adzharicum, also known as the Caucasian mullein, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mullein genus, characterized by its tall stem and white or yellowish flowers. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Verbascum adzharicum can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to address coughs, colds, and other respiratory problems.
